changes.comment: Add optional file-based transfer APIs (`tryDownloadCacheEntryToFileAsync`, `tryUploadCacheEntryFromFileAsync`) to `ICloudBuildCacheProvider`, allowing cache plugins to transfer cache entries directly to and from files on disk without buffering entire contents in memory. Implement in `@rushstack/rush-http-build-cache-plugin`, `@rushstack/rush-amazon-s3-build-cache-plugin`, and `@rushstack/rush-azure-storage-build-cache-plugin`. Gated behind the `useDirectFileTransfersForBuildCache` experiment.
